posts.author: joehardy (joe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All!

Wondering if someone will be able to tell me if this is possible at the moment. We would ideally like to create quotes in xero based on information in Monday. The issue i seem to be having with integration is that I cant pull subitems from monday to generate quote items. Is this possible at the moment? Appreciate any advice!

Joe
